segments.text: Give thanks to the Lord, for he is good; his love endures forever.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Let Israel say:
His love endures forever.
segments.speaker: Israel

segments.text: Let the house of Aaron say:
His love endures forever.
segments.speaker: House of Aaron

segments.text: Let those who fear the Lord say:
His love endures forever.
segments.speaker: Those who fear the Lord

segments.text: When hard pressed, I cried to the Lord;
he brought me into a spacious place.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: The Lord is with me; I will not be afraid. What can mere mortals do to me?
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: The Lord is with me; he is my helper. I look in triumph on my enemies.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: It is better to take refuge in the Lord than to trust in humans.
It is better to take refuge in the Lord than to trust in princes.
All the nations surrounded me, but in the name of the Lord I cut them down.
They surrounded me on every side, but in the name of the Lord I cut them down.
They swarmed around me like bees, but they were consumed as quickly as burning thorns; in the name of the Lord I cut them down.
I was pushed back and about to fall, but the Lord helped me.
The Lord is my strength and my defense; he has become my salvation.
Shouts of joy and victory resound in the tents of the righteous:
The Lord's right hand has done mighty things!
segments.speaker: Righteous

segments.text: The Lord's right hand is lifted high; the Lord's right hand has done mighty things!
segments.speaker: Righteous

segments.text: I will not die but live, and will proclaim what the Lord has done.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: The Lord has chastened me severely, but he has not given me over to death.
Open for me the gates of the righteous; I will enter and give thanks to the Lord.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: This is the gate of the Lord through which the righteous may enter.
I will give you thanks, for you answered me; you have become my salvation.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: The stone the builders rejected has become the cornerstone;
the Lord has done this, and it is marvelous in our eyes.
The Lord has done it this very day; let us rejoice today and be glad.
Lord, save us! Lord, grant us success!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Blessed is he who comes in the name of the Lord. From the house of the Lord we bless you.
The Lord is God, and he has made his light shine on us. With boughs in hand, join in the festal procession up to the horns of the altar.
You are my God, and I will praise you; you are my God, and I will exalt you.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Give thanks to the Lord, for he is good; his love endures forever.
segments.speaker: Psalmist
